CONTENT.Club career: Conté is a product of the youth academies of Saarbrücken, Kaiserslautern and Hoffenheim. He was promoted to their reserves in 2022, and made his first appearance on the bench in the Bundesliga that same year. In June 2023, he started training with the senior team and was promoted to the squad. On 4 November 2023, he made his senior debut with Leverkusen in a 3–2 Bundesliga loss to Bayer Leverkusen on 4 November 2023.On 3 July 2024, Conté moved on loan to Karlsruher SC in 2. Bundesliga.
CONTENT.External links: Bambasé Conté at SoccerwayBambasé Conté at DFB (also available in German)
CONTENT.International career: Born in Germany, Conté is of Guinean descent. He is a youth international for Germany, having played up to the Germany U20s.

SUMMARY: Bambasé Conté (born 7 July 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a winger for 2. Bundesliga club Karlsruher SC on loan from Hoffenheim.
